user.title: Set up Mini Screen ESP32
user.description: Enter the details for your Mini Screen ESP32 device. The integration will verify that the device is reachable before saving.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this device (e.g. "Mini Screen").
data_description.ip_address: The local IP address of the ESP device (e.g. 192.168.1.50).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the device at that IP address. Make sure the device is powered on and connected to your network, then try again.
error.already_configured: A Mini Screen ESP32 device with this IP address is already configured.

init.title: Mini Screen ESP32 Settings
init.description: Update the IP address or configure the auto-dim schedule.

data_description.ip_address: The local IP address of the ESP device (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.dim_start: Time to dim the display each day, 24-hour format (e.g. 22:00).
data_description.dim_end: Time to restore full brightness each day, 24-hour format (e.g. 07:00).
data_description.dim_level: Brightness level during the dim period.
data_description.dim_restore_level: Brightness level to restore after the dim period.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the device at the new IP address. Make sure the address is correct and the device is online.
